# vector: status_resp
# STATUS_RESP：RUNNING 态，组 0=LIVE 其余 OFF
# raw  = COBS 编码前帧 (ver|type|flags|seq|len|payload|crc32c, 全 LE)
# wire = COBS(raw) + 0x00 定界符（SCI 链路实际字节）
raw: 51820002002a0002000000000015cd5b07d7110000d61100000700000000000000ebb6cc0801000000090000000000000002a547ca
wire: 0351820202022a0202010101010715cd5b07d7110103d61101020701010101010106ebb6cc0801010102090101010101010502a547ca00
